title: Add 'bd lint' to linting pipeline
description:
Update 'mise.toml' to include 'bd lint' in the 'lint' task. This ensures beads consistency checks are run alongside other linters. Verify that 'bd lint' passes locally.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'mise run lint' runs 'bd lint'
- CI/local linting fails if bead issues exist

title: Remove secrets.yml and clean up vars
description:
After all references are updated to use direct lookups, remove the 'group_vars/all/secrets.yml' file. Also update 'group_vars/all/vars.yml' or new defaults to ensure no broken references remain.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'group_vars/all/secrets.yml' file is deleted
- No references to the deleted file remain in the codebase
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Replace vault Lookups with 1Password Lookups
description:
Update all tasks that currently use '{{ secret_var }}' (loaded from vault) to use direct 1Password lookups. This involves identifying all variables in secrets.yml and finding where they are used.

Example replacement:
From: '{{ github_token }}'
To: "{{ lookup('community.general.onepassword', 'op://ServiceAccountAccess/Fleet github/token') }}"

Or using vars that do the lookup.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All usages of vault-encrypted variables are replaced with 1Password lookups
- Playbooks run successfully without 'secrets.yml' present
- No undefined variable errors during execution
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Update AGENTS.md with correct role list
description: The current AGENTS.md lists 6 roles but user_core is missing. Update the file to reflect the actual state of the roles/ directory.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md lists all 7 roles found in roles/ directory.

title: Update LICENSE file
description:
Update the root LICENSE file to reflect the new 'All Rights Reserved' status, replacing the MIT-0 license text.

## Acceptance Criteria
- LICENSE file content replaced with All Rights Reserved notice
- Copyright year and holder are correct (2026 T.R. Fullhart)
- 'mise run lint' passes

title: Configure beads sync branch
description: bd doctor warned that sync-branch is not configured. Run 'bd migrate sync beads-sync' to set it up.

title: Add test task to mise.toml
description: Create a task in mise.toml to run ansible role tests. This ensures tests can be run easily and consistently, handling path issues correctly.

title: Update local.yml to include user_core
description:
Add 'user_core' to the roles list in local.yml, likely after 'base' role. Ensure it runs on all hosts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'local.yml' includes 'user_core' role
- 'user_core' runs on all hosts (localhost, laptop, etc.)
- 'ansible-playbook local.yml --syntax-check' passes
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Expand test coverage to all roles
description:
Currently 'mise run test' only runs the base role tests. Update the task or create new ones to run tests for all roles (sdr, meshtastic, printing_3d, reform, amateur_radio, user_core) to ensure complete coverage.

Subtasks:
- [ ] Update AGENTS.md to reflect current role structure (user_core, etc.)
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for user_core
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for sdr
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for meshtastic
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for printing_3d
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for reform
- [ ] Verify/enable tests for amateur_radio
- [ ] Create unified test runner in mise

title: Verify/enable tests for user_core role
description:
Ensure roles/user_core/tests/test.yml exists and works.

## Acceptance Criteria
Run ansible-playbook roles/user_core/tests/test.yml --syntax-check and verify it passes.
acceptance_criteria: Run ansible-playbook roles/user_core/tests/test.yml --syntax-check and verify it passes.

title: Create unified test runner in mise
description:
Update mise.toml to include a task that runs tests for all roles.

## Acceptance Criteria
'mise run test' executes tests for all 7 roles.
acceptance_criteria: 'mise run test' executes tests for all 7 roles.

title: Prompt for 1Password service token/signin if not authenticated
description: Ensure ansible execution checks for an active 1Password session. If 'op whoami' fails, prompt the user to sign in or provide a service token, preventing unclear failures during secret lookup.

title: Duplicate user variables to user_core
description:
Copy user-related variables (base_user_shell, base_user_groups, user_name, etc.) from roles/base to roles/user_core/vars/ or defaults/. DO NOT remove them from roles/base yet to avoid breaking existing tasks during the migration window.

## Acceptance Criteria
- User variables present in roles/user_core/defaults/main.yml or vars/
- Variable values match existing definitions
- No variables removed from roles/base (yet)
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Fix beads git hooks to work with mise
description: The git hooks installed by bd fail because 'bd' is not in the PATH when invoked by git. Need to configure them to load mise or use absolute paths.

title: Investigate ansible-lint internal-errors
description:
Investigate and resolve 'internal-error' failures in ansible-lint related to vault password script failures (op read) during syntax checks. Ensure local environment or CI handles 1Password authentication correctly or gracefully skips vault-dependent checks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- mise run lint:ansible passes without internal errors

title: Update AGENTS.md documentation
description:
Update AGENTS.md to reflect the new licensing policy, removing references to SPDX MIT-0 headers.

## Acceptance Criteria
- AGENTS.md mentions 'All Rights Reserved'
- No references to 'MIT-0' or 'SPDX' headers in documentation
- 'mise run lint' passes

title: Remove .get_vault_password.sh and cleanup vault config
description:
Remove .get_vault_password.sh and cleanup vault config

## Acceptance Criteria
- '.get_vault_password.sh' file is deleted
- 'ansible.cfg' does not reference 'vault_password_file'
- Ansible runs without warnings about missing vault file
- 'mise run lint' passes

title: setup Crush with integration with Todoist
configure Crush to use the todoist MCP
Fix markdownlint errors in PLANNING_ROLE.md
description:
Fix MD030 (list-marker-space) and MD032 (blanks-around-lists) errors in PLANNING_ROLE.md identified during lint run.

## Acceptance Criteria
- mise run lint:markdown passes for PLANNING_ROLE.md

title: Modify .get_become_password.sh to prompt on failure
description:
Update the .get_become_password.sh script to capture the exit code of 'op read'. If it fails, attempt to read from the TTY (prompt the user) and output that password instead. This ensures playbook execution can continue even if 1Password is unavailable or doesn't have the secret. Verify if reading from /dev/tty works when invoked by Ansible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- .get_become_password.sh detects 'op read' failure
- Script prompts user on TTY if 1Password fails
- Script returns entered password to Ansible
- Ansible sudo works with manual password entry
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Integrate 1Password check into local.yml pre-tasks
description:
Integrate 1Password check into local.yml pre-tasks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- local.yml includes 'Check 1Password' task/role
- Playbook fails early if 1Password check fails (and 1Password is expected)
- Dependencies (fleet-m0w) are linked
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Remove user variables from base role
description:
Remove the user-related variables (base_user_shell, base_user_groups, etc.) from roles/base once they are confirmed working in roles/user_core and all tasks have been migrated.

## Acceptance Criteria
- User variables removed from roles/base/defaults
- User variables removed from roles/base/vars
- grep for old variable names in roles/base returns no definitions
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Configure constantine host to use printing_3d role
description: Create `host_vars/constantine.yml` and add `printing_3d` to the `roles_to_run` list.
close_reason: Verified roles_to_run configuration is correct in host_vars/constantine.yml. Completed missing role dependencies (blender) in separate task.

title: Replace Ansible Vault with 1Password lookup
description:
Remove 'group_vars/all/secrets.yml' and replace encrypted variables with direct 1Password lookups (community.general.onepassword or command lookup). This simplifies secret management by removing the intermediate vault file.

## Success Criteria
- All secrets migrated to 1Password
- 'group_vars/all/secrets.yml' removed
- Vault configuration removed from 'ansible.cfg'
- Playbooks execute successfully using 1Password lookups
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Configure Crush to use Ansible LSP
description: Apply the LSP configuration for @ansible/ansible-language-server to Crush.

title: Update AGENTS.md with next steps rule
description: Add a rule to AGENTS.md instructing agents to always capture identified next steps as new tasks in the beads system.
close_reason: Updated AGENTS.md with next steps rule

title: Migrate user tasks to user_core
description:
Copy the content of 'roles/base/tasks/user_environment.yml' to 'roles/user_core/tasks/main.yml'. DO NOT remove the original file yet to ensure tasks continue running via the base role until 'user_core' is enabled in 'local.yml'. Ensure 'user_name' and other vars are accessible in the new role.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'roles/user_core/tasks/main.yml' populated with user environment tasks
- Tasks are syntactically correct and reference available variables
- 'ansible-lint roles/user_core' passes (or has equivalent warnings to original)
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Update Planning Role in AGENTS.md with testing requirements
description:
Update the 'Planning Role' section in 'AGENTS.md' to explicitly state that when creating or updating tasks, the planner must ensure that passing linting ('mise run lint') and tests ('mise run test') are included in the Acceptance Criteria, as appropriate.

## Implementation Details
- Locate '## Agent Roles' -> '### Planning Role' in 'AGENTS.md'.
- Add a new rule (e.g., Rule 5) or append to 'Capture Everything'.
- Text should essentially say: 'Include Quality Gates: Ensure that Acceptance Criteria for tasks includes passing linting (mise run lint) and tests (mise run test) where appropriate.'

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'AGENTS.md' updated with new Planning Role rule
- Rule mentions 'mise run lint' and 'mise run test'
- 'mise run lint' passes

title: Integrate role definitions into AGENTS.md
description:
Merge the content of 'PLANNING_ROLE.md' and 'WORKER_ROLE.md' into 'AGENTS.md' to centralize agent instructions.

## Implementation Details
1. Create a new top-level section '## Agent Roles' at the end of 'AGENTS.md'.
2. Add '### Planning Role' subsection and paste content from 'PLANNING_ROLE.md'.
3. Add '### Worker Role' subsection and paste content from 'WORKER_ROLE.md'.
4. Delete 'PLANNING_ROLE.md' and 'WORKER_ROLE.md'.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 'AGENTS.md' contains a section for 'Planning Role' with content from 'PLANNING_ROLE.md'
- 'AGENTS.md' contains a section for 'Worker Role' with content from 'WORKER_ROLE.md'

title: Ensure community.general collection is installed
description:
Check requirements.yml and ensure 'community.general' is present and at a version that supports the 'onepassword' lookup plugin (at least version 2.0.1). If not, add/update it. This is a prerequisite for using 1Password lookups.

## Acceptance Criteria
- requirements.yml includes community.general >= 2.0.1
- 'ansible-galaxy collection list' shows community.general installed
- 1Password lookup plugin is available
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

Implement 1Password prompt/signin logic

- Or instructs user to run 'op signin'

- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Refactor github_token usage to 1Password lookup
description:
Refactor 'github_token' to use the 1Password lookup plugin.

Details:
- Reference: `op://ServiceAccountAccess/Ansible Chezmoi GitHub Token/token`
- Action: Update definition in group_vars (likely move to new vars file) to use `{{ lookup('community.general.onepassword', 'op://...') }}`.
- Cleanup: Remove encrypted definition from secrets.yml.

## Acceptance Criteria
- github_token variable uses 1Password lookup
- secrets.yml no longer contains github_token
- Playbook run succeeds (fetches value correctly)
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Fix UFW OpenSSH profile error in base role tests on Arch Linux
description: The `mise run test` command fails on `roles/base/tasks/linux_enable_sshd.yml` with `ERROR: Could not find a profile matching 'OpenSSH'`. This requires investigating why the OpenSSH profile is missing on the Arch Linux environment or adjusting the variable `base_ufw_ssh_app_profile_name` in `roles/base/vars/archlinux.yml`.
close_reason: Fixed UFW profile name for Arch Linux to use 'SSH'

title: Configure Crush to use Ansible Language Server
description: Verify and ensure Crush configuration is set up to utilize the installed Ansible Language Server.

title: Map encrypted variables to 1Password paths
description:
Inspect group_vars/all/secrets.yml (using 'mise run secrets:view') and create a mapping of variable names to their corresponding 1Password item references (op://...). Document this mapping in the issue comments or a temporary file to guide the refactoring.

### Mapping Analysis

- **github_token**: Found at `op://ServiceAccountAccess/Ansible Chezmoi GitHub Token/token`
- **zerotier_network_id**: Created new item. Found at `op://ServiceAccountAccess/Fleet ZeroTier Network ID/network_id`

title: Create check_1password_session task file
description:
Create a new task file (e.g., 'roles/base/tasks/check_1password.yml') that runs 'op whoami' to verify the session. Register the result (e.g., 'op_session_check'). Use 'ignore_errors: true' or 'failed_when: false' so the playbook does not abort immediately; the actual failure handling/prompting will be implemented in the dependent task (fleet-h0y).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Task file created in roles/base/tasks/
- Runs 'op whoami'
- Registers result variable
- Does not fail the playbook on error (yet)
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes

title: Research Crush LSP configuration
description: Read https://github.com/charmbracelet/crush documentation to determine how to configure LSP servers.

title: Update repository and role licensing to All Rights Reserved
description: Update the licensing of the repository and all roles to 'All Rights Reserved'. This involves checking and updating license headers in all relevant files (e.g., tasks/main.yml, meta/main.yml, etc.) and updating any LICENSE files.

title: Prompt for sudo password if 1Password lookup fails
description: Modify the become password retrieval mechanism to fallback to an interactive prompt or handle the failure gracefully if the 1Password lookup for the host's sudo password fails. Currently uses .get_become_password.sh.

title: Ensure ansible collections installed via pre-task
description:
Ensure required ansible collections (requirements.yml) are installed as a pre-task in the playbook. Currently uses 'community.general.ansible_galaxy_install', which creates a circular dependency if community.general isn't already installed. Consider using 'command: ansible-galaxy ...' or a local action to bootstrap.

CONSTRAINT: Must support running via 'ansible-pull' on systems that only have 'ansible-core' installed. Older versions of 'ansible-pull' do not support the '--install-deps' flag, so the playbook must handle dependency installation explicitly without relying on that flag.

title: Migrate user variables to user_core
description: Identify variables used by user tasks (base_user_shell, base_user_groups, etc.) and move their definitions to roles/user_core/vars/ or defaults/. Note that 'base' role might still need shell package names, so check for dependencies.

title: Update AGENTS.md with bd lint workflow rule
description:
Update AGENTS.md to specify that when creating or updating tasks, 'bd lint' must be run afterwards and any issues addressed. The task creation/update process is not complete until 'bd lint' succeeds.

## Acceptance Criteria
- AGENTS.md contains explicit instruction to run 'bd lint' after task changes
- AGENTS.md defines task completion to include passing 'bd lint'

title: Refactor base role: Split user environment config into separate role
description:
Extract user environment configuration (dotfiles, shell setup, etc.) from the 'base' role into a dedicated role. This improves modularity and separation of concerns.

## Success Criteria
- User environment tasks successfully migrated to 'user_core' role
- 'base' role simplified
- Deployment to localhost/laptop maintains same user configuration state (idempotent)
- 'mise run lint' passes
- 'mise run test' passes
